title: Chief Publishing Officer
summary: The publishing leader responsible for editorial standards, catalog architecture, rights discipline, and public knowledge release quality.
biography: This executive seat is available. Neuroartan has defined the Chief Publishing Officer role as a real operating standard before appointing a public holder.
The publishing leader responsible for editorial standards, catalog architecture, rights discipline, and public knowledge release quality.
The public profile is intentionally role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Turn Neuroartan’s writing, research, and institutional records into controlled publication systems without weakening accuracy or ownership.
source_posture: Governed role placeholder for future executive hiring
